seo.title: Theming
seo.description: Theme system configuration with dark mode support, CSS custom properties, and next-themes integration

header.title: Application Theming System
header.description: Guide to implementing theme switching (light/dark) using React Context, HOC, and localStorage.

benefit_text: Isolation of <one>theme logic</one> from business components. Automatic saving of user choice and prevention of theme 'flicker' on load.

types.title: Types and Interfaces
types.description: Define allowed theme values (<one>light</one>, <two>dark</two>) and context structure for state management.

context.title: React Context
context.description: Creating a data channel for passing theme data down the component tree without prop drilling.

hook.title: Custom Hook
hook.description: Encapsulating context access logic in a convenient <one>useTheme</one> hook with provider presence validation.

provider.title: Theme Provider
provider.description: Implementing a provider component that manages state, interacts with <one>localStorage</one>, and manipulates <one>html</one> classes.

setup.title: Initialization HOC
setup.description: Creating the <one>withTheme</one> Higher-Order Component for easy application wrapping at the provider level.

ui.title: UI Component (Toggle)
ui.description: Creating a toggle button that uses the <one>useTheme</one> hook to switch the visual state.

provider.label: Provider:
provider.text: Located in <one>src/app/providers/theme/</one>. Responsible for global initialization.

shared.label: Shared Logic:
shared.text: Context, hooks, and UI components are placed in <one>shared/</one> as they are reusable.
